/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -O3 -march=native -fno-plt -fstrict-aliasing -fstack-protector-strong -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -shared -Wl,-soname,libimgengine.so -o libimgengine.so CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/cold/debug.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/cold/error.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/cold/validation.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/core/config.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/core/context.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/core/dispatcher.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/core/image.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/core/init.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/hot/batch_engine.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/src/hot/pipeline_exec.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/pipeline/engine.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/pipeline/graph.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/pipeline/hardware_registry.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/pipeline/jump_table.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/pipeline/scheduler.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/runtime/affinity.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/runtime/backpressure.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/runtime/queue_spsc.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/runtime/worker.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/memory/arena.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/memory/hugepage.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/memory/numa.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/memory/pool.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/memory/slab.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/plugins/plugin_bleed.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/plugins/plugin_crop.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/plugins/plugin_grayscale.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/plugins/plugin_pdf.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/plugins/plugin_registry.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/plugins/plugin_resize.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/io/decoder/jpeg/jpeg_decoder.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/io/decoder/png_decoder.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/io/decoder/stb_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/io/encoder/jpeg_encoder.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/io/encoder/output_writer.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/io/vfs/memory_stream.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/io/vfs/posix_io.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/io/vfs/s3_adapter.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/security/fuzz_hooks.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/security/input_validator.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/security/sandbox.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/observability/logger.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/observability/metrics.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/observability/profiler.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/observability/tracing.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/arch/x86_64/avx2/color_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/arch/x86_64/avx2/resize_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/arch/x86_64/avx2/resize_h_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/arch/x86_64/avx2/resize_v_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/arch/x86_64/avx512/avx512.c.o CMakeFiles/imgengine.dir/arch/x86_64/scalar/color_scalar.c.o  -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libturbojpeg.so -fsanitize=address,undefined
